# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "appServiceName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "myWebApp"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "mySQLServer"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "myDatabase"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "mystorageaccount"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "appServicePlanName": "[concat(parameters('appServiceName'), '-plan')]",
    "sqlServerAdminLogin": "adminuser",
    "sqlServerAdminPassword": "[parameters('sqlServerAdminPassword')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {}
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2018-02-01",
      "name": "[variables('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "F1"
      },
      "properties": {
        "workerSizeId": 0,
        "numberOfWorkers": 1
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2018-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appServiceName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      ],
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value)]"
            }
          ]
        },
        "appServiceEnvironment": {
          "isXenon": false
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2017-10-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "displayName": "SQL Server"
      },
      "properties": {
        "version": "12.0"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2017-10-01-preview",
          "name": "AllowAllWindowsAzureIps",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "databases",
          "apiVersion": "2017-10-01-preview",
          "name": "[parameters('databaseName')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "securityAlertPolicies",
          "apiVersion": "2017-10-01-preview",
          "name": "DefaultPolicy",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "state": "Enabled",
            "emailAccountAdmins": true,
            "sendAlertEmailsToAdmins": true
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Resources/deployments",
      "apiVersion": "2019-05-01",
      "name": "appServiceConnection",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "templateLink": {
          "uri": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure/azure-quickstart-templates/master/101-webapp-sqlserver-database/azuredeploy.json",
          "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0"
        },
        "parameters": {
          "webAppName": {
            "value": "[parameters('appServiceName')]"
          },
          "dbServerName": {
            "value": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
          },
          "databaseName": {
            "value": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
          },
          "administratorLogin": {
            "value": "[variables('sqlServerAdminLogin')]"
          },
          "administratorLoginPassword": {
            "value": "[variables('sqlServerAdminPassword')]"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
